extendText.en: It's a beautiful, sunny, spring day. See? The trees are blossoming.
extendText.zh: 这是阳光明媚的春天，看，树都开花了。

extendText.en: Can you find the tree with white flowers? What about the tree with pink flowers?
extendText.zh: 找到开白花的树了吗？开粉花的呢？

extendText.en: Oh... Bella hears something. What's that noise!?
extendText.zh: Bella 听到了什么。那是什么声音！？

guides.action: 先不读字，让孩子看纸质书上的三个角色和两棵不同颜色的花树
guides.en: Look at the trees! Can you find white flowers? Pink flowers?
guides.zh: 看看这些树！能找到白花吗？粉花呢？
guides.note: 建立「看图说话」习惯，不急于翻页

guides.action: 学 Bella 把手放在耳朵边，安静 3 秒，等孩子猜
guides.en: Shhh... listen carefully. What's that noise?
guides.zh: 嘘……仔细听。那是什么声音？
guides.note: 孩子猜不出来很正常，悬念留到下一页揭晓

extendText.en: Oh! Frogs! The frogs are sleeping and snoring!
extendText.zh: 青蛙！青蛙们在睡觉打呼噜！

extendText.en: How many frogs do you see? Let's count... 1, 2, 3, 4.
Who's hiding in the tree? Yes, it's a slug.
extendText.zh: 树里藏着谁？对，是鼻涕虫。

extendText.en: Wake up, frogs! It's spring!
extendText.zh: 醒醒，青蛙们！春天来啦！

guides.action: 指着叶子上、水边每一只青蛙，和孩子一起数
guides.en: How many frogs? Let's count... 1, 2, 3, 4!
guides.note: 数完可以问：Why aren't they on the lilypads? 引发思考

guides.action: 指向树洞，让孩子猜是谁，揭晓 slug 时可以装惊讶
guides.en: Who's hiding in the tree? Yes, it's a slug! He looks sleepy too.
guides.zh: 谁躲在树里？对，是鼻涕虫！它看起来也困困的。
guides.note: slug 不常见，中文说「鼻涕虫/蛞蝓」即可，不必深究

guides.action: 音量逐渐加大，第三遍最大声，带动孩子一起喊
guides.en: Wake up, frogs! It's spring!
guides.zh: 醒醒，青蛙们！春天来啦！
guides.note: 配合拍书页或拍腿，增加节奏感

extendText.en: Uh oh. They don't wake up. Maybe they didn't hear us.
extendText.zh: 糟了，它们醒不过来，也许没听见。

extendText.en: Let's try again... louder this time. Wake up, frogs!!
extendText.zh: 再试一次，这次更大声！

extendText.en: Oh! Now Ducky hears something. What's that noise!
extendText.zh: Ducky 也听到了什么。那是什么声音！

extendText.en: Whose tail is that? No... it's Jojo's tail.
extendText.zh: 那是谁的尾巴？不……是 Jojo 的。

guides.action: 第一遍正常，第二遍明显更大，让孩子感受语气变化
guides.en: They don't wake up. Let's try again... LOUDER! Wake up, frogs!!
guides.zh: 叫不醒。再试一次……更大声！醒醒，青蛙们！！
guides.note: 可以解释：Maybe they didn't hear us — 教「没听见」的表达

guides.action: 看 Ducky 捂耳朵的动作，再指向画面边缘的紫色尾巴
guides.en: What's that noise? Whose tail is that? It's Jojo's tail!
guides.zh: 什么声音？谁的尾巴？是 Jojo 的！
guides.note: 顺势说 Let's follow Jojo —— 为翻页做铺垫

extendText.en: What are those!? Are those cats? No. They are hedgehogs.
extendText.zh: 那些是什么？是猫吗？不，是刺猬。

extendText.en: Do you think they're cute? I'm going to pet one... ouch! They're prickly!
extendText.zh: 可爱吗？我要摸……哎哟！好扎！

extendText.en: Wake up, hedgehogs! It's spring!
extendText.zh: 醒醒，刺猬们！春天来啦！

guides.action: 遮住文字，只指画面让孩子猜是什么动物，猜完再读 hedgehog
guides.en: Are those cats? No... they are hedgehogs!
guides.zh: 是猫吗？不……是刺猬！
guides.note: hedgehog 是本书新词，猜谜方式记忆更深

guides.action: 假装伸手摸刺猬，突然缩手说 ouch，表情夸张
guides.en: I'm going to pet one... OUCH! They're prickly!
guides.zh: 我要摸一下……哎哟！好扎人！
guides.note: prickly 比 cute 更值得讲，用动作比翻译更有效

guides.action: 和喊青蛙一样，带孩喊 Wake up, hedgehogs!
guides.en: Wake up, hedgehogs! It's spring!
guides.zh: 醒醒，刺猬们！春天来啦！
guides.note: 预判：刺猬也不会醒，可以问孩子 Why not?

extendText.en: Let's sound like cats. Meow... wake up hedgehogs!!!
extendText.zh: 学猫叫。喵喵……醒醒刺猬们！！！

extendText.en: They're sleeping so hard in their little holes under the tree.
extendText.zh: 它们在树下的洞里睡得好沉。

extendText.en: Can you find all the mushrooms? Oh! Bella hears something else!
extendText.zh: 找到所有蘑菇了吗？Bella 又听到了什么！

guides.action: 先示范 meow，让孩子跟读，再对着书页喊 wake up
guides.en: Meow... meow... wake up, hedgehogs!!!
guides.zh: 喵喵……醒醒，刺猬们！！！
guides.note: 学动物叫降低开口压力，孩子更愿意参与

guides.action: 在纸质书上圈出所有蘑菇，数完再继续
guides.en: Can you find all the mushrooms? How many?
guides.zh: 找到所有蘑菇了吗？有几个？
guides.note: 找物游戏让页面「活」起来，别一直线性读

guides.action: Bella 侧耳时暂停，问孩子 What does Bella hear?
guides.en: Oh! Bella hears something else! What's that noise?
guides.zh: Bella 又听到了什么！那是什么声音？
guides.note: 第三次「What's that noise」——可以问孩子发现规律了吗

extendText.en: Oooooh! Sssssssssssnakes!!!
I see colorful snakes — purple, green, yellow, and blue.
extendText.zh: 彩色蛇——紫、绿、黄、蓝。

extendText.en: What do snakes sound like? Ssssss... Wake up, snakes! It's spring!
extendText.zh: 蛇怎么叫？嘶嘶嘶……醒醒，蛇们！

guides.action: 逐条指蛇，问 What color is this one? 孩子答完再确认
guides.en: Purple snake... green, yellow, and blue! Do you like snakes?
guides.zh: 紫色的……还有绿、黄、蓝！你喜欢蛇吗？
guides.note: 怕蛇的孩子可以说 Me too, a little nervous — 共情很重要

guides.action: 拉长音 Ssssss，让孩子用食指做蛇游走动作
guides.en: What do snakes sound like? Ssssss... yeah!
guides.zh: 蛇怎么叫？嘶——嘶——对！
guides.note: 声音 + 动作双通道，比单纯读词记得牢

guides.action: 说 Let's help Bella —— 赋予孩子「帮忙者」角色
guides.en: Let's help Bella! Wake up, snakes! It's spring!
guides.zh: 帮 Bella 一起喊！醒醒，蛇们！春天来啦！
guides.note: 蛇依然不会醒，为下一页学 bear 叫铺垫

extendText.en: Let's sound like a bear! Grrrr! Wake up, snakes!!!
extendText.zh: 学熊叫。吼！醒醒，蛇们！！！

extendText.en: Does Bella look happy? No, she looks a little sad.
extendText.zh: Bella 开心吗？不，她有点难过。

extendText.en: Gyuri! Help us!!!!
extendText.zh: Gyuri！帮帮我们！！！！

guides.action: 双手举高做爪子，发出 Grrrr! 尽量低沉
guides.en: Grrrr! Wake up, snakes!!!
guides.zh: 吼！醒醒，蛇们！！！
guides.note: 三种叫声对比：meow → grrrr，问孩子哪个更大声

guides.action: 指着 Bella 的脸，问 happy or sad，让孩子说 Why
guides.en: Does Bella look happy? Why is she sad?
guides.zh: Bella 开心吗？她为什么难过？
guides.note: 因为动物 won't wake up —— 培养共情，不只练英语

guides.action: 喊两遍 Gyuri! Help us! 第二遍更大，像真的在求救
guides.en: Who can help? GYURI the SUPERHERO! Gyuri! Help us!!!!
guides.zh: 谁能帮忙？超级英雄 Gyuri！Gyuri！帮帮我们！
guides.note: 喊完立刻翻页，Gyuri 出场是全书高潮

extendText.en: Here comes Gyuri! He's flying through the air!
extendText.zh: Gyuri 来啦！他在飞！

extendText.en: His antlers are glowing! His red cape is so cool!
extendText.zh: 角在发光！红披风好酷！

extendText.en: But where's Ducky? No. That's just a little ant.
extendText.zh: Ducky 在哪？不，那只是小蚂蚁。

guides.action: 语气兴奋，可以用手比划 Gyuri 飞行的弧线
guides.en: Here comes Gyuri the Superhero! He's flying!
guides.zh: 超级英雄 Gyuri 来啦！他在飞！
guides.note: 问 Do you want to put on a cape too? 孩子通常会点头

guides.action: 指 antlers 和 cape，让孩子找 glowing 的部分
guides.en: His antlers are glowing! His red cape is so cool!
guides.zh: 角在发光！红披风好酷！
guides.note: glow 是本书关键词，可以关灯用手电筒演示 glowing

guides.action: 在页面右下角找，故意指蚂蚁问 Is this Ducky?
guides.en: Where's Ducky? Is this Ducky? No... that's just a little ant!
guides.zh: Ducky 在哪？这是 Ducky 吗？不……只是小蚂蚁！
guides.note: 小误会制造笑点，缓解前面连续叫不醒的挫败感

extendText.en: Gyuri tickles the frog's nose! Tickle, tickle, tickle!
extendText.zh: Gyuri 挠青蛙鼻子！挠挠挠！

extendText.en: Gyuri taps the hedgehog's back! Tap, tap, tap!
extendText.zh: Gyuri 拍刺猬的背！拍拍拍！

extendText.en: Gyuri shakes the snake awake! Shake, shake, shake!
extendText.zh: Gyuri 摇醒蛇！摇摇摇！

guides.action: 用指尖在孩子手心轻挠，说 tickle tickle，然后指青蛙
guides.en: Tickle, tickle, tickle! Wake up, frog! He's awake!
guides.zh: 挠挠挠！醒醒，青蛙！他醒啦！
guides.note: 第一个成功的 wake up，语气要 celebratory

guides.action: 轻轻拍孩子后背三下，说 tap tap tap，提醒 prickly 不能真摸
guides.en: Tap, tap, tap! Be careful — the hedgehog is prickly!
guides.zh: 拍拍拍！小心——刺猬会扎人！
guides.note: 回顾 prickly，形成前后呼应

guides.action: 握着孩子手腕轻轻左右摇，说 shake shake shake
guides.en: Shake, shake, shake! Wake up, snake! Tickle, tap, shake!
guides.zh: 摇摇摇！醒醒，蛇！挠、拍、摇！
guides.note: 三个动词是本页核心，读完可以玩「妈妈说动作孩子做」

extendText.en: Look! The animals are all awake!
extendText.zh: 看！动物们都醒啦！

extendText.en: Can you find the frog? The snake? The hedgehog?
extendText.zh: 找到青蛙、蛇和刺猬了吗？

extendText.en: Uh oh... it's a BEAR! He looks really grumpy! Quick! Close the book!
extendText.zh: 天哪……是熊！好生气！快！合上书！

guides.action: 快速在纸质书上点 frog、snake、hedgehog，找完击掌
guides.en: Can you find the frog? The snake? The hedgehog? Yes!
guides.zh: 找到青蛙了吗？蛇呢？刺猬呢？对！
guides.note: 回顾全书三种动物，有「毕业感」

guides.action: 看到 bear 时突然压低声音，然后快速合上书
guides.en: Uh oh... it's a BEAR! Goodbye bear! Quick quick! Close the book!
guides.zh: 天哪……是熊！再见熊！快快快！合上书！
guides.note: 结尾越快越好，留下回味；下次读孩子会期待这个环节
